authoringDecisions.description: Product page hero with full-width background image, overlay with uppercase title, champagne accent bar, two CTA buttons, and award logo badges. Reuses existing hero-product pattern from motorhome page.

contentModel.row2: Heading 'CAR INSURANCE' + CTA buttons (Get a quote, Retrieve a quote)

authoringDecisions.description: Alert notice about Ageas partnership — heading and two paragraphs. An author would write this as a callout/notice with heading and body text.
Introduction heading and paragraph about finding the best car insurance. Simple rich text content.
Two side-by-side cards: 'New to Saga?' and 'Already a customer?' each with heading, description, and two CTA buttons. This is a 2-column layout.

contentModel.row1: Col1: 'New to Saga?' heading + description + 2 buttons | Col2: 'Already a customer?' heading + description + 2 buttons

authoringDecisions.description: Award badge image alongside heading and descriptive paragraph. 2-column layout with image left, text right.

contentModel.row1: Col1: Which? Best Buy award image | Col2: Heading + body paragraph

authoringDecisions.description: Rich text: heading 'What does car insurance cover?' followed by explanatory paragraphs with inline links.
Grid of 6 feature items under 'Why choose our car insurance' heading. Each item has an SVG icon, bold title, and description. Best modeled as cards with icon, title, and description.

contentModel.headerRow: 'Why choose our car insurance' heading + description
contentModel.rows: 6 items, each: icon image + title + description paragraph

authoringDecisions.description: Simple alert with heading and paragraph about who provides the insurance. Author writes as styled notice/callout.
Heading 'Compare car insurance from Saga'
3-column comparison table (Standard/Select/Plus) with 9+ feature rows using tick/dash icons and text values. Complex structured data best modeled as a table block.

contentModel.headers: Cover and benefits | Saga Standard | Saga Select | Saga Plus (2-year fixed price badge)
contentModel.rows: Feature name + description | tick/dash/text per column

authoringDecisions.description: 'Get a quote' CTA button below the table.
Two side-by-side content panels, each with image, heading with colored accent border, description, and 'Find out more' link. Best modeled as cards.

contentModel.rows: 2 items, each: image + heading (with accent) + description + CTA link

authoringDecisions.description: Marble texture divider — decorative image. Author places as inline image.
Accordion with header 'What is car insurance?' intro text, and 4 expandable items with detailed Q&A content including bulleted lists.

contentModel.rows: 4 items: question title | answer body (paragraphs + lists)

authoringDecisions.description: Grid of 6 icon-label link buttons under 'What can we help with?' heading. Each item: SVG icon + text label + link. Best modeled as cards with icons.
Customer testimonial carousel with heading, quote icon, 3 rotating testimonial cards (quote + customer name/location), prev/next navigation, and Trustpilot widget.

contentModel.headerRow: Heading 'Here's what our customers have to say about us...'
contentModel.rows: 3 testimonial cards: quote text + customer name

authoringDecisions.description: Award badge image alongside heading and descriptive paragraph. Same pattern as Section 4 (Which? callout).

contentModel.row1: Col1: Defaqto 5 Star award image | Col2: Heading + body paragraph

authoringDecisions.description: FAQ accordion with header, intro text, 4 expandable Q&A items, and 'See all FAQs' button.

contentModel.rows: 4 items: question | answer paragraphs with links

authoringDecisions.description: Centered CTA banner with heading and two buttons on champagne accent background. Author writes heading + buttons; section metadata provides styling.

Card carousel with heading 'More from Saga', description, and 7 article/product cards. Each card: image, badge label (Article/Holidays/Product information), linked heading, description paragraph. Reuses cards-articles pattern from homepage.

contentModel.rows: 7 items: image + badge label + linked heading + description
